title: Lone Wolf and Cub: Baby Cart in the Land of Demons
original_title: 子連れ狼 冥府魔道
overview: Ogami Itto is challenged by a quintet of warriors, each armed with one fifth of Ogami's assassin fee and one fifth of the information he needs to complete his assignment.
